capability: repository-search capability consumed by the harness
rationale: The repository-search capability is exposed to any MCP host, not only this harness, so a discoverable, interoperable protocol boundary is justified over an ordinary in-process interface. MCP advertises the tool and its input schema through tools/list, lets an unrelated host consume the same server, and isolates the capability in its own process. A direct function call or a private local-process interface would tie the capability to this one caller and give up discovery and interoperability.
